commands.review_summary:
The branch centralizes CLI runtime model-alias equivalence for status/fallback logic, reuses active CLI auth labels for equivalent selected routes, marks CLI usage as a fresh context snapshot, adds regression tests, and updates CHANGELOG.md.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: with selected anthropic/<model> and active claude-cli/<model>, current main's fallback/status code compares raw refs literally and resolves selected auth independently. I did not run a live Claude CLI account because the review is read-only, but the failing path is clear in source.
